headline: Software Loans Went From Catnip to Kryptonite. Where Are They Now?
summary: Blue Owl Technology Finance’s portfolio is heavily exposed to software borrowers financed using annualized recurring revenue, a lending strategy now facing skepticism as artificial intelligence reshapes the industry.

headline: Intercontinental Exchange Launches ICE Private Credit Intelligence with Apollo as Anchor Partner
summary: ATLANTA & NEW YORK, March 17, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today announced the launch of ICE Private Credit Intelligence, which will bring greater transparency to the private credit market. headline: How Epstein-Related Lawsuits and Governance Scrutiny Will Impact Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors
summary: Apollo Global Management has faced intense scrutiny in recent weeks as multiple securities class action lawsuits alleged previously undisclosed communications and potential business ties between senior leadership and Jeffrey Epstein, claiming past public statements about the relationship were misleading and damaging to the firm’s reputation. These allegations, coupled with mounting legal actions and calls for regulatory review, raise material questions about Apollo’s governance, disclosure...
